files.SKILL.md:
# Developer Reference Card

## Motions

| Motion  | Purpose                                                        |
|---------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
| Orient  | Read prior notes and outcomes. Read the task. Then act.        |
| Verify  | Identify the boundary condition before implementing.           |
| Narrow  | Change only what the task requires.                            |
| Confirm | Verify the outcome directly, not from the response to a write. |
| Record  | Write structural patterns before finishing, not after.         |

---

## Grounding rules

| Value kind          | Required source                          | If missing                        |
|---------------------|------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| Identifier          | Something read in this task              | Fetch it — do not assume          |
| Boundary condition  | Derived from the task specification      | Ask explicitly before coding      |
| Prior pattern       | Notes from prior tasks                   | Check notes before re-deriving    |

---

## Boundary checks — apply before every implementation

| Failure class         | How it hides                                        | How to catch it                          |
|-----------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|
| Count off-by-one      | Passes at N−1 and N+1, wrong at exactly N           | Test the exact threshold in code         |
| Range endpoint        | Middle of range correct, endpoint excluded/included wrong | Verify inclusive vs exclusive explicitly |
| Mutable key           | Works until unhashable type used as set member      | Use canonical hashable form              |
| Naive time arithmetic | Wrong across timezone transitions only              | Use timezone-aware operations            |
| Positional data join  | Correct until column order changes                  | Always join by name, not position        |

---

## Scope rules

| Situation                        | Action                                      |
|----------------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| Adjacent code has a problem      | Document it; do not fix it now              |
| Task is smaller than it appears  | Do the smaller thing                        |
| Refactoring would help clarity   | Defer unless the task requires it           |
| One change touches many files    | Reduce to minimum — each file is risk       |

---

## Notes discipline

Write before finishing, not after.

| Record                                      | Do not record                         |
|---------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| The class of mistake (structural)           | Task-specific identifiers or values   |
| The correct approach (structural)           | A log of what you did this task       |
| What a symptom of this mistake looks like   | Information that does not generalise  |

---

## Confirmation

| Observed                              | Interpretation                                  |
|---------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Write response looks successful       | Not sufficient — verify by reading the result   |
| No error returned                     | Not sufficient for state-changing operations    |
| Result matches intended state on read | Sufficient                                      |
